category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Tuvalu.

title.en: China-to-Tuvalu EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入图瓦卢：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入圖瓦盧：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Tuvalu Department of Energy / TEC expectations, pre-nascent EV market conditions, 240/415 V 50 Hz grid conditions, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 connector direction, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, atoll salt-mist derating, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与图瓦卢能源部 / TEC要求、前萌芽阶段电动汽车市场条件、240/415 V 50 Hz电网条件、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2接口方向、IEC 61000 EMC证据、环礁盐雾降额、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與圖瓦盧能源部 / TEC要求、前萌芽階段電動汽車市場條件、240/415 V 50 Hz電網條件、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2接口方向、IEC 61000 EMC證據、環礁鹽霧降額、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Department of Energy requirement determination, TEC connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, and installers should verify current Tuvalu Department of Energy expectations, TEC project requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、能源部要求裁定、TEC接入批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电点运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行图瓦卢能源部要求、TEC项目要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、能源部要求裁定、TEC接入批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電點運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行圖瓦盧能源部要求、TEC項目要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Tuvalu, the comparison is forward-looking because Tuvalu's EV charging market is essentially pre-nascent. The practical gaps are IEC-based safety and EMC evidence, IEC 62196 Type 2 connector hardware where public AC charging is specified, TEC project and grid-connection acceptance, and salt-mist / humidity derating for atoll installations. Tuvalu uses 240 V single-phase / 415 V three-phase at 50 Hz: the frequency is the same as China, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. A GB/T-only charger using GB/T 20234 connectors and GB/T 27930 DC communication is not physically or protocol compatible with IEC Type 2 / IEC 61851 deployments without hardware and firmware redesign.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入图瓦卢时，由于图瓦卢电动汽车充电市场基本处于前萌芽阶段，本对照具有前瞻性。实务差距包括IEC体系安全和EMC证据、公共交流充电如被指定时所需的IEC 62196 Type 2接口硬件、TEC项目及并网验收，以及适用于环礁安装的盐雾/湿热降额。图瓦卢电网为240 V单相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz：频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。仅支持GB/T 20234接口和GB/T 27930直流通信的GB/T充电桩，若不进行硬件和固件重新设计，不能与IEC Type 2 / IEC 61851部署实现物理或协议兼容。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入圖瓦盧時，由於圖瓦盧電動汽車充電市場基本處於前萌芽階段，本對照具有前瞻性。實務差距包括IEC體系安全和EMC證據、公共交流充電如被指定時所需的IEC 62196 Type 2接口硬體、TEC項目及併網驗收，以及適用於環礁安裝的鹽霧/濕熱降額。圖瓦盧電網為240 V單相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz：頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。僅支持GB/T 20234接口和GB/T 27930直流通訊的GB/T充電樁，若不進行硬體和固件重新設計，不能與IEC Type 2 / IEC 61851部署實現物理或協議兼容。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
